signals.headline: Kevin Warsh Faces Tough Senate Confirmation Hearing for Fed Chair to Replace Jerome Powell Amid Inflation and Rate Debat
signals.raw:
Kevin Warsh Faces Tough Senate Confirmation Hearing for Fed Chair to Replace Jerome Powell Amid Inflation and Rate Debates | NO | HIGH confidence**

Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell is under pressure, with Republican Sen. Thom Tillis pledging to block Kevin Warsh's confirmation as long as the Trump administration investigates Powell[4]. Warsh, Trump's nominee, faced sharp questioning on April 2
matched_markets: Will Trump agree to Iranian enrichment of uranium in April?
Will Powell say "Tariff inflation" during April press conference?

signals.headline: Cooper Flagg Confirmed Available for Mavericks vs
signals.raw:
Cooper Flagg Confirmed Available for Mavericks vs. Raptors Game | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Dallas Mavericks rookie **Cooper Flagg** was a game-time decision but is officially cleared to play against the **Toronto Raptors**, with head coach Jason Kidd confirming a **20-25 minute** restriction due to a compressed schedule.[1]  
This announcement comes ahead of tipoff (around 5:00 p.m. local, Raptor
matched_markets: Will Cooper Flagg win the 2025–26 NBA Rookie of the Year award?
